problem_statement: Stephen needs to experience agentic capabilities firsthand before championing internally. Fortune 500 IT lockdown prevents easy deployment. Must prove value on personal device before corporate approval path.

engagement_tracks.name: Personal Enablement
engagement_tracks.description: Stephen builds personal Claw with mock pharma data, tests adversarially, then makes internal case

engagement_tracks.name: Hourly In-Person
engagement_tracks.description: Joel helps Stephen with hands-on setup at his house

objections: Pharma-grade IT lockdown (MDM, DLP, endpoint monitoring, zero-trust)
Cannot approve external MDM connection without higher IT authority
success_signals: Stephen confirms 7 capabilities (5 original + branded doc gen + BI query orchestration)
Key insight: 'one intelligence layer, not five separate tools'
